headline: Mettler-Toledo International (NYSE:MTD) Edges Lower as Q1 Earnings Beat Fails to Offset Cautious Outlook
summary: Mettler-Toledo beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates with $8.91 EPS, but revenue slightly missed. Shares fell 1.1% as cautious Q2 guidance and muted organic sales growth offset the strong earnings performance.
